sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 14.73 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.14)

statement.latex: Conjecture:\/ There is a function$f$on the natural numbers such that, if$$is a finite, vertex-transitive, locally-quasiprimitive graph of valency$v$, then the number of automorphisms fixing a given vertex is at most$f(v)$.
